step_rationale: Endothelial function regulator; mobilizes progenitor cells to restore endothelial barrier post-MI.
mechanism: G-CSF improves endothelial function and mobilizes bone-marrow-derived progenitors contributing to vascular repair after myocardial infarction.

references.title: The effect of granulocyte-colony stimulating factor on endothelial function in patients with myocardial infarction.
